attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  RBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
  RBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  RBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
  RBCM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  RBCM.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG ,
  RBCM.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
  NBCM.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
  NBCM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY,
  NBCM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_BKGS_FLG,
  NBCM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG,
  RBCM.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD, /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  NBCM.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  /* Added for GCSP */
    ,NBCM.DV_GCSP_FLG
    ,NBCM.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT
    /* Added for GCSP */
  ,RBCM.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE	
  ,NBCM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_BKGS_CHANNEL_TYPE
  ,NBCM.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_DESCRIPTION,
   NBCM.OTM_OVERRIDE_PTNR_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  NBCM.MNL_PTNR_SITE_OVERRIDE_FLG,
  NBCM.MANUAL_PTNR_OVERRIDE_REASON_CD
 FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_RET_ERP_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE RBCM,
  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NBCM
 WHERE   
  NBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = RBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  AND NBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = RBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  AND NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = RBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  AND (  NBCM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY <> RBCM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   OR NBCM.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG <> RBCM.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
      OR NBCM.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG <> RBCM.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG OR 
   NBCM.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD <> RBCM.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD OR /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
   NBCM.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE <> RBCM.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE
     )

SELECT
  DVAD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
  DVAD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  DVAD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
  DVAD.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  DVAD.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG_AS AS CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
  DVAD.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG,
  NBCM.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG,
  NBCM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_PTR_STE_PRTY_KEY,
  NBCM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHANNEL_BKGS_FLG,
  NBCM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_CHNL_DRP_SHP_FLG,
  DVAD.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD,/*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  NBCM.DV_AS_OF_FSC_MTH_RTM_CD/*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
  /* Added for GCSP */
    ,NBCM.DV_GCSP_FLG
    ,NBCM.BK_BE_GEO_ID_INT
    /* Added for GCSP */
	,DVAD.BOOKING_CHANNEL_TYPE	
  ,NBCM.AS_OF_FSC_MTH_BKGS_CHANNEL_TYPE
 ,NBCM.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_DESCRIPTION
 ,NBCM.OTM_OVERRIDE_PTNR_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  NBCM.MNL_PTNR_SITE_OVERRIDE_FLG,
  NBCM.MANUAL_PTNR_OVERRIDE_REASON_CD
 FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_RET_DVAD_BKGS_CHNL_MEASURE DVAD,
  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE NBCM
 WHERE 
  NBCM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = DVAD.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
  AND NBCM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = DVAD.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  AND NBCM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = DVAD.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  AND ( NBCM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY <> DVAD.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
   OR NBCM.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG <> DVAD.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG_AS
   OR NBCM.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG <> DVAD.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG
   OR NBCM.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD <> DVAD.DV_ROUTE_TO_MARKET_CD /*ADDED AS A PART OF ICPM Q2FY16*/
      )
